summary: Completed testing of iToke credit flow features (iteration 11). All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed price breakdown display, cancel/refund functionality, and scrollable QR views.
passed_tests: GET /api/auth/me - returns tokens and credits balance
POST /api/qr/generate with use_credits - saves credits_used in voucher
POST /api/qr/generate - deducts credits from client wallet immediately
GET /api/vouchers/my - returns vouchers with credits_used, final_price_to_pay, original_price, discounted_price
POST /api/vouchers/{id}/cancel - cancels active voucher and refunds credits
POST /api/vouchers/{id}/cancel - returns 400 for already used voucher
POST /api/vouchers/{id}/cancel - returns 400 for already cancelled voucher
POST /api/qr/validate - transfers credits to establishment withdrawable_balance
Frontend: 'Meus QR' tab shows price breakdown (Pago com creditos / Pagar no balcao)
Frontend: 'Meus QR' tab shows cancel button for active vouchers
Frontend: Cancel voucher works and shows 'devolvidos' (refunded) text
Frontend: QR fullscreen view is scrollable with backup code + price details
Frontend: QR modal shows balance summary and 'Usar Créditos na Compra' toggle
Frontend: Text not clipped on mobile - price labels fit screen properly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All credit flow features are working correctly. Credits are deducted at QR generation, refunded on cancel, and transferred to establishment on validation. The 'Meus QR' tab displays price breakdown (credits used, amount to pay) for each voucher. Cancel button works for active vouchers. QR fullscreen is scrollable with backup code and price details. No text clipping issues on mobile.

verified_features.verification: Backend test test_cancel_active_voucher_refunds_credits passed, Frontend shows 'devolvidos' text

verified_features.feature: Credits transfer to establishment on validation

verified_features.verification: Frontend shows 'Pago com creditos' and 'Pagar no balcao' for each voucher

verified_features.feature: QR fullscreen scrollable with price details
verified_features.verification: Frontend QR fullscreen shows backup code, 'Valor pago com creditos', 'Valor a pagar no balcao'
Mobile viewport (390x844) shows all text without clipping
